headline: Is 3M Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
summary: While 3M has underperformed the SPX over the past year, Wall Street analysts maintain a moderately optimistic outlook on the stock’s prospects.

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Honeywell Intl, Raises Price Target to $275
summary: Barclays  analyst Julian Mitchell   maintains Honeywell Intl (NASDAQ:HON) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $259 to $275.

headline: The Bull Case For Honeywell International (HON) Could Change Following Aerospace Spin-Off Plans And HONA Filing
summary: Honeywell recently filed a Form 10 registration statement with the SEC for the planned spin-off of Honeywell Aerospace, which aims to become an independent public company called HONA on Nasdaq in the third quarter of 2026, focused on electrification, autonomy and safety across commercial air transport, business aviation and defense markets. The company has also scheduled an Investor Day for June 3, 2026, where management plans to outline how separating the Aerospace business could reshape...
